_comment: Seeded to your per-user dir as config.json on first run. Edit that copy. CLI flags override these. See GUIDE.md.

model._models_note: Model ids auto-resolve: if these aren't loaded in LM Studio, the app picks whatever VL model IS loaded. Set 'frontier' to 'claude' to use Claude Code (haiku) for hard 99UNS cases.

hosts._note: Add named hosts here, e.g. a LAN/Tailscale machine running LM Studio: "laptop": "http://hostname:1234/v1/chat/completions". Use --host NAME to switch.

_example.note: name a folder so you can pass --location example instead of the full path
